description: Use this API to return an array of complex values for subsystem areas. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, xarray = aareacplx(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the area subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem areas to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the area quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: xarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all areas in the working case.
valid area subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only subsystem areas with at least one ac bus assigned to them.
for subsystem areas with any equipment (ac buses, loads, and/or dc buses) assigned to them.

string.description: Total complex load on buses in the area (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex load of loads in the area (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex generation on buses in the area (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex losses assigned to the area (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex power to transformer magnetizing admittance for winding 1 buses in the area (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex net interchange from the area (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex load on buses in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total complex load of loads in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total complex generation on buses in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total complex losses assigned to the area (units determined by power output option).
Total complex power to transformer magnetizing admittance for winding 1 buses in the area (units determined by power output option).
Total complex net interchange from the area (units determined by power output option).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of XARRAY, is not large enough.
